title: Planning Graph Next Steps Mapping
description: Schema for calculator → next steps mappings used by the Planning Graph, Now CTAs, and SessionRunner launchers.

id.description: Canonical identifier for this mapping node (e.g., garden.seedViability.nextSteps).

calculator.description: Name of the calculator feature that owns this mapping (e.g., SeedViabilityCalculator).

version.description: Semantic version of this mapping definition (e.g., 1.0.0).

status.description: Whether this mapping is currently active.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update.

domains.description: Domains that this mapping touches (garden, storehouse, etc.).

inputs.description: Mapping from semantic input keys to calculator output paths.

additionalProperties.description: Dot-path from the calculator result object (e.g., viability.effectiveViabilityPct).

defaults.description: Default values to be used when an input is missing.

rules.description: Ordered set of condition → recommendation mappings.

priority.description: Priority for evaluation. Lower numbers evaluated earlier.

conditions.description: Thresholds and flags used to decide when this rule applies.

effectiveViabilityPctMin.description: Minimum effective viability percentage (inclusive) for this rule.

effectiveViabilityPctMax.description: Maximum effective viability percentage (inclusive) for this rule.

allowShortage.description: Whether this rule can still fire when a shortage exists.

fallback.description: If true, this rule is used as a fallback when other conditions do not match.

id.description: Unique identifier for this recommendation within the rule.

description.description: Longer description explaining why this is recommended.

domain.description: Target domain for the resulting session or plan.

sessionReason.description: Reason string attached to the session.requested event.

sessionKind.description: High-level kind of session (e.g., planting, refill, planning, inventory-update).

primary.description: Whether this is the primary recommendation for this rule.

feedsInto.description: Planning Graph nodes or subsystems this action feeds into.

analyticsTags.description: Tags for analytics and event payloads.

nowCtas.description: Domain-specific Now CTA configuration linking to launchers and SessionRunner.

label.description: Label shown on the Now button for this domain.

sessionReason.description: Reason string used when emitting session.requested.

sessionKind.description: High-level category of the session (e.g., planting, refill).
